## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's proposal for content marketing services with Fieldguide, addressing contract terms and building a business case for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX agreed to quarterly billing instead of semi-annual for the $15,000/month fee](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Fieldguide needs to justify the 12-month commitment internally, balancing it with potential full-time hires](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [GrowthX provided ROI data and cost comparisons to help build Fieldguide's business case](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Fieldguide aims for budget approval by end of week/early next week, with final decision pending internal discussions](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)

## Topics

### Contract Terms and Flexibility

  - [$20,000 flat fee for Phase 1, billed upfront with net 30](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [$15,000/month fee for Phase 2, now agreed to be billed quarterly instead of semi-annually](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [12-month commitment for Phase 2 is non-negotiable due to high demand](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [7-week period to opt out after Phase 1 before committing to Phase 2](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)

### ROI and Business Case

  - [GrowthX provides end-to-end services: strategy, content creation, staging, publishing, and image generation](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Potential cost savings: reduced paid ad spend, no need for LLM analytics tools](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Cost-effective: \~$0.10 per word compared to industry standards](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [GrowthX shared ROI data from other clients and a breakdown of services valued at $200,000+](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Phase 1 will produce tangible results (published articles, initial ROI data) before Phase 2 commitment](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)

### Fieldguide's Internal Considerations

  - [Balancing GrowthX partnership with potential full-time hires (SEO, SEM, designer)](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Need to justify 12-month commitment to finance team](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Aligning with growth targets and showing up more in search results is a priority](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Involving key stakeholders: CEO, Mark (leadership), Yasina (potential report manager)](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)

### Content Strategy and Implementation

  - [Flexibility in content placement: separate hub vs. existing blog](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [No additional materials required from Fieldguide, but existing brand guidelines and sales materials are helpful](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
  - [GrowthX will work with Fieldguide's HubSpot CMS](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [Need to determine internal process for content review and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to update contract terms to reflect quarterly billing](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Jenny to meet with Mark on Friday to discuss partnership details](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Jenny to provide update on potential contract redlines and timeline for signature by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Friday at 11:30 AM Pacific to address final questions/concerns](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
  - [Fieldguide to internally determine roles for content review and publishing in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/cVo4Lswjux8hAAH_Pxr92d_hV-9c_H-_?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
